overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character running through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character navigates through stone courtyards, covered walkways, and open plazas illuminated by torchlight and moonlight, eventually entering a walled courtyard with a large statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city courtyard with stone archway

events.description: character passes through large stone archway into covered walkway
character enters doorway transitioning from covered walkway to interior passage

agents.ego_description: running through courtyard toward archway, passing NPC pedestrians on the path

notable_agents.action: male NPC in tunic walking ahead through the archway
NPC standing near building entrance watching the character pass

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with small windows and weathered walls
large mature tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
large decorative stone archway connecting courtyard sections
bushes with pink flowers along low stone wall
wooden door frame with stone surround leading to interior

segments.scene_description: The character begins in an open courtyard surrounded by stone buildings, running toward a large decorative archway. After passing through the arch into a covered walkway lined with columns, the character approaches and enters a stone doorway, transitioning from outdoor to indoor space while torchlight illuminates the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city street with fabric awnings and wooden scaffolding

events.description: exits doorway into narrow street with buildings on both sides
character turns right at street intersection

agents.ego_description: sprinting through narrow streets and turning corners past buildings with fabric awnings

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue tunic walking toward camera on the left side of street
NPC sitting on building steps near a doorway

entered.detail: tan fabric canopy extending from building facade over walkway
wooden support structures and beams against building walls
tall palm tree visible above building rooftops
metal fire basket on pole providing street illumination

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the doorway into a narrow cobblestone street, the character runs past buildings with fabric awnings and wooden scaffolding. The street is lit by wall-mounted torches and burning braziers. The character turns right at an intersection, passing NPCs walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with winged statue and cypress trees

events.description: emerges from narrow street into large open plaza with central statue
on-screen text 'Jewish Quarters' appears indicating district entry

agents.ego_description: running across open plaza toward large winged statue, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC in dark robe walking across the plaza path
NPC in white robe standing near building entrance observing

entered.detail: large stone monument of winged figure on pedestal with weapon raised
classical stone building with columns and triangular pediment
tall slender dark green cypress trees lining the plaza
large metal fire pit burning brightly near building entrance
residential building with upper balcony and multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza paved with large stone tiles, dominated by a massive winged statue on a central pedestal. Tall cypress trees and classical Roman buildings frame the space. The character runs toward the statue as the text 'Jewish Quarters' appears, indicating entry into a new district. Burning braziers provide warm light against the cool night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled courtyard with large robed statue and two-story villa

events.description: enters gated courtyard through stone gateway from the plaza

agents.ego_description: entering walled courtyard through gate and approaching large central statue

entered.detail: tall stone gate frame with wooden doors leading into courtyard
monumental statue of robed figure holding object, standing on raised platform
large ceramic planters with greenery flanking entrance
stone seating along courtyard wall
wooden balcony on upper floor of two-story building

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a stone gateway into a private walled courtyard. The space features a large robed statue on a central pedestal, surrounded by a two-story villa with balconies. Potted plants and stone benches line the walls, and the area is illuminated by warm torchlight against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian city at night, transitioning from enclosed stone walkways into a grand public plaza and finally into a private villa courtyard. It begins in an open courtyard where the character runs through a decorative archway and into a columned walkway, moving from the open air into a torchlit indoor space. As the character emerges from a stone doorway, the scene shifts to a narrow cobblestone street lined with fabric awnings and wooden scaffolding, illuminated by burning braziers. The environment then expands into a wide, tiled plaza dominated by a massive winged statue and framed by cypress trees and Roman buildings, marking the entry into the Jewish Quarters. Finally, the camera follows the character through a stone gateway into a secluded walled courtyard featuring a robed statue and a two-story villa under the cool night sky.
